purpose: Lumen Science capability-source admission lock — 42-item inventory with exact-source SHA-256 and unified schema. This file grants no runtime authority.

shared_source_files.role: Connector/ConnectorRegistry/ConnectorHit type definitions shared by all 42 connectors
Shared HTTP client (User-Agent, timeout, retry, cache, rate-limit pacing) used by all connectors
Defensive accessors (str, num, arr, asRecord, summarize) shared by genomics connectors
UniProt accession resolver bridge (resolveUniProtAccessions) used by AlphaFold and SIFTS connectors

items.billing: free (no key), free with NCBI API key (higher rate limit)
items.official_rate_limit: 3 req/s without API key; 10 req/s with API key (NCBI E-utilities guidelines)
items.license: NCBI policies; PubMed abstracts may be copyrighted; NCBI does not hold copyright to abstracts
items.copyright_boundary: abstracts may be copyrighted by publishers; NCBI provides access but not redistribution rights
items.live_probe_condition: requires explicit live-network authorization; recommends NCBI tool/email registration
items.reason: Rust Lumen adapter implemented with offline fixture product proof; live remains pending-deny

items.pagination: rows + offset (cursor optional via deep paging)
items.billing: free (public pool); polite pool with mailto email
items.official_rate_limit: Public pool: 1 req/s, 1 concurrent. Polite pool: 50 req/s (subject to fair-use). Per https://community.crossref.org/t/16137
items.license: Bibliographic facts generally not copyrightable; Crossref-generated metadata CC0; abstracts retain publisher/author rights
items.copyright_boundary: selected fields are factual bibliographic metadata (DOI, title, container-title); abstracts intentionally excluded
items.live_probe_condition: requires explicit live-network authorization and operator-approved CROSSREF_MAILTO
items.reason: Rust Lumen adapter implemented; offline fixture proof accepted; live pending-deny

items.official_rate_limit: not documented (Europe PMC states 'reasonable use'; API max pageSize=1000)
items.local_rate_limit: 1 request per 1000ms (conservative local cap, not an official service quota)
items.license: Article-level; Europe PMC metadata freely accessible; individual articles have their own copyright/license
items.copyright_boundary: returns lite bibliographic metadata only; abstracts and full text excluded; article-level rights must be verified before content reuse
items.live_probe_condition: requires explicit live-network authorization; article-level license verification before content reuse
items.reason: Rust Lumen adapter implemented with offline fixture proof; live pending-deny

items.billing: metered API; free daily budget with API key; paid tiers available
items.official_rate_limit: 100 req/s hard service limit; daily budget applies (OpenAlex API docs)
items.license: OpenAlex dataset CC0; API service use subject to OpenAlex terms; underlying article content retains article-level rights
items.copyright_boundary: selected fields are CC0 bibliographic metadata; abstracts and full text intentionally excluded; verify article-level rights before reuse
items.live_probe_condition: requires explicit billable live-network authorization and operator-approved OPENALEX_API_KEY
items.reason: Rust Lumen adapter implemented; built-binary ACP product proof accepted; live pending-deny

items.runtime_env_var: SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY (optional; falls back to unauthenticated tier)
items.billing: free (both unauthenticated and introductory API key tier)
items.official_rate_limit: Unauthenticated: shared pool of 1000 req/s (may be further throttled under high load). Introductory API key: 1 req/s. Per https://api.semanticscholar.org/api-docs/
items.local_rate_limit: 1 request per 3000ms (local conservative policy; not an official quota)
items.license: S2 data available under ODC-BY; API TOS at https://api.semanticscholar.org/api-docs/
items.copyright_boundary: metadata retrieval; abstracts excluded by field selection; full-text rights vary by publisher
items.live_probe_condition: requires explicit live-network authorization; optional API key provides an identified dedicated introductory quota of 1 req/s and supportability; it does not imply throughput above the unauthenticated shared-pool ceiling of 1000 req/s
items.reason: DS-0 inventory complete; awaits DS-2 implementation

items.official_rate_limit: No more than 1 request every 3 seconds; max 4 concurrent connections (arXiv API TOS). Per https://info.arxiv.org/help/api/
items.license: arXiv metadata freely accessible; individual article rights vary by submitter/license
items.copyright_boundary: metadata retrieval only; full-text PDF rights are per-article
items.reason: DS-0 inventory complete; awaits DS-3 implementation

items.license: Preprint content rights vary by author; bioRxiv TOS at https://www.biorxiv.org/about/terms
items.copyright_boundary: preprint metadata retrieval only; content reuse requires author/publisher permission
items.reason: DS-0 inventory complete; awaits DS-8 implementation

items.pagination: size + cursor (next link in response headers)
items.official_rate_limit: not documented (UniProt REST API guidelines: fair use)
items.license: CC-BY-4.0 for copyrightable database content; UniProt provides no correctness warranty; some data may be covered by patents
items.copyright_boundary: selected fields are annotation summary; sequences, features, references, and citation text excluded
items.reason: Rust Lumen adapter implemented with offline fixture proof; live pending-deny

secondary_files.role: Defensive accessors (str, num, arr, asRecord, summarize) used by eutils-consuming connectors including clinvar, dbsnp, ncbi-gene

items.official_rate_limit: 3 req/s without API key; 10 req/s with API key (NCBI E-utilities)
items.license: NCBI policies; per-database data policies apply
items.copyright_boundary: E-utilities is transport infrastructure; data copyright depends on queried database
items.reason: synsci eutils.ts is a shared, db-parameterizable E-utilities client (esearch(db, term, retmax) accepts db as a parameter). Rust Lumen's pubmed.rs hardcodes `db=pubmed` in both esearch_path() and esummary_path(). Protocol partially overlaps with existing PubMed implementation but no shared, db-parameterizable Rust adapter exists. eutils.ts is counted as a separate inventory item because it represents the shared E-utilities transport pattern used by clinvar, dbsnp, ncbi-gene, and geo. Its final disposition depends on whether DS-1 (ProtocolAdapter trait) enables a parameterizable E-utilities adapter beyond PubMed.

items.method: GET (official WADL defines only GET; overview page mentions POST but no formal POST specification exists)
items.pagination: max + start (query parameters); client-side Object.values() iteration
items.credential_redaction: REJECTED: Official WADL (https://webservice.thebiogrid.org/application.wadl) defines accessKey as style="query" in GET method only. No POST method is defined in the WADL. The credential is therefore required in the URL query string, which violates Lumen's credential-never-in-URL hard constraint. No runtime implementation or live probe is admitted.
items.billing: free (requires free registration for access key) — not applicable, connector rejected
items.license: BioGRID data CC BY 4.0; requires free registration
items.copyright_boundary: protein-protein interaction metadata
items.live_probe_condition: prohibited — final_disposition is rejected-unsafe-or-duplicate; credential in URL query string violates Lumen safety policy
items.reason: BioGRID requires accessKey as a query parameter in the official WADL (https://webservice.thebiogrid.org/application.wadl). The WADL defines only GET method with accessKey as style="query". Although the overview page mentions POST support, no formal POST specification or body-parameter transport is defined. The documented credential placement in URL query string violates Lumen's credential-never-in-URL hard constraint (execution book line 801). Therefore rejected as unsafe/duplicate per admission policy.
